name: Snake Plant
care: Water sparingly. Let soil dry completely between waterings. Thrives in indirect light but tolerant of low light.

name: Aloe Vera
care: Prefers bright, indirect light. Water infrequently - only when soil is completely dry. Tolerates heat and drought.

name: Peace Lily
care: Does well in low to moderate light. Keep soil consistently moist but not waterlogged. Will droop when thirsty as a signal.

name: Basil
care: Needs 6-8 hours of high quality light daily. Keep soil moist. Pinch off flower buds to encourage leaf growth. Use leaves regularly.

name: Cactus
care: Requires plenty of bright light and minimal water. Allow soil to dry out completely between watering. Prefers well-draining soil.

name: Orchid
care: Prefer filtered, indirect bright light. Water weekly with room temperature water. Benefits from high humidity. Blooms require patience.

name: Spider Plant
care: Very tolerant and easy to grow. Prefers bright, indirect light. Water when top inch of soil is dry. Produces babies on runners.

name: Lavender
care: Requires full bright light for 6+ hours daily. Prefers well-draining soil. Water when top inch is dry. Fragrant flowers attract pollinators.

name: Fiddle Leaf Fig
care: Needs bright, indirect light and consistent care. Water when top inch of soil is dry. Wipe leaves periodically. Avoid moving location frequently.

name: Mint
care: Tolerant and vigorous grower. Prefers medium light and consistently moist soil. Pinch back frequently to encourage bushiness and use leaves.

name: Jade Plant
care: Likes bright light and can tolerate some direct sun. Water sparingly - only when soil is completely dry. Slow growing and long-lived.

name: Ageratum
care: Prefer medium light. Keep soil consistently moist but not waterlogged. Produces fluffy flowers in blue, pink, or white. Deadhead for more blooms.

name: Golden Pothos
care: Extremely forgiving vine. Tolerates low light but grows faster with more light. Water when top inch of soil is dry. Excellent for hanging baskets.

name: Rosemary
care: Aromatic herb needing 6+ hours of bright sunlight. Prefers well-draining soil that's not too wet. Drought tolerant once established. Use leaves in cooking.

name: ZZ Plant
care: Extremely low maintenance and tolerates low light. Water infrequently - every 2-3 weeks. Glossy leaflets add tropical look. Very hardy.

name: Camellia
care: Beautiful flowers require careful attention. Prefers bright, filtered light and consistently moist acidic soil. High humidity helps. Blooms in winter.

name: Begonia
care: Prefers bright, indirect light. Keep soil consistently moist but with good drainage. Enjoys humidity. Many varieties with gorgeous foliage.

name: Sunflower
care: Vibrant flowers love full sunlight for 6+ hours daily. Keep soil moist during growing season. Tall varieties may need staking. Cheerful blooms.

name: Echeveria
care: Succulent needing plenty of bright light. Water sparingly and let soil dry completely. Prefers well-draining cactus soil. Rosette-shaped leaves.

name: Philodendron
care: Great for beginners. Tolerates various light conditions including low light. Water when top inch of soil is dry. Easy propagation from cuttings.
